namespace TestDomain;

/// <summary>
/// Triggers data fetch for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
public record OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction();

/// <summary>
/// Data arrived for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
public record OrderProjectionLoadedAction(IReadOnlyList<OrderProjection> Items);

/// <summary>
/// Data fetch failed for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
public record OrderProjectionLoadFailedAction(string Error);
